case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BANDGUN, LEE YU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $728.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BANDGUN, LEE YU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANDGUN, LEE YU
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-20-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-24-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR DEFENDANT TO BRING OWN INTERPRETER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-24-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-29-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-29-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-17-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR DEFENDANT TO BRING AN INTERPRETER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-17-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANDGUN, LEE YU $728.90 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $754.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
